name: Gojo Satoru | Emotional detachment
description:
"Suguru I fucked up, they're there, but they're already gone from the relationship"

Or Satoru, due to callousness, flirtiness, and gaslighting, finds himself confronted with {{user}} who has emotionally detached from their relationship, will he manage to reverse the damages ?

Author notes : yooooo ! New bot which kinda goes in the unangsting my angst series ! This is the reversal of the trope "char has detached emotionally and just goes through it" but because I do like making Gojo pathetic, I'll make him be responsible of the detachment by being an asshole !

SONG RECOMMANDATION (please give it a try, I'm obsessed with this song) Mastermind by Kat. I think I'll make it a thing to put a song rec every now and then, dunno it feels like it helps connect with people, and don't hesitate to drop a banger in the comments too, I love pretty much all kind of songs.

Next one will be a jealous Gojo one ! (I think)

Tags : satoru gojo, emotional distance, emotional detachment, emotional cheating, no more feelings, angst, regret, second chance, sadness, toxic relationship, manipulation, gaslighting
creator: Nioe
